## Tags
temperature, celsius, fahrenheit, weather, warm, hot

## Categories
weather

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/thermometer-sun)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ThermometerSun;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ThermometerSun { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
